title: Firestorm Labs raises $82M to take drone factories into the field
description: A defense startup just raised $82 million to put drone factories inside shipping containers and bring manufacturing to the front lines.

title: Meet Shapes, the app bringing humans and AI into the same group chats
description: Think Discord chats, but with AI characters in addition to humans.

title: A Falcon 9 rocket will hit the Moon this summer at seven times the speed of sound
description: The object will be traveling at 2.43 km a second, or 5,400 mph, upon impact.

title: Sam Altman is “the face of evil” for not reporting school shooter, says lawyer
description: Lawsuits: OpenAI didn't report ChatGPT user to cops to protect Altman, IPO.

description: Security firms find themselves especially exposed.

title: I've Covered Robots for Years. This One Is Different
description: From sorting chicken nuggets to screwing in lightbulbs, Eka’s robotic claw feels like we're approaching a ChatGPT moment for the physical world.

title: Colby Adcock’s Scout AI raises $100M to train its models for war. We visited its bootcamp
description: We visited Scout AI's training ground where it's working on AI agents that can help individual soldiers control fleets of autonomous vehicles.

title: How AI Could Help Combat Antibiotic Resistance
description: At WIRED Health, British surgeon Ara Darzi said AI is set to transform the diagnosis and treatment of drug-resistant infections. But a lack of incentives means innovation may not reach patients.

description: Today, nuclear energy enjoys a rare moment of support across the political spectrum in the US. title: At his OpenAI trial, Musk relitigates an old friendship
description: It's a story Musk has told before -- in interviews and to author Walter Isaacson for his bestselling biography of Musk -- but Tuesday was the first time he said it under oath.

title: OpenAI Really Wants Codex to Shut Up About Goblins
description: “Never talk about goblins, gremlins, raccoons, trolls, ogres, pigeons, or other animals or creatures unless it is absolutely and unambiguously relevant,” reads OpenAI’s coding agent instructions.

title: Anti-Trump Instagram pic of seashells now enough to indict ex-FBI directors
description: The clown car is all gassed up.

description: The judge also warned Musk and Sam Altman to curb their “propensity to use social media to make things worse outside the courtroom” after both sides traded attacks online.

title: Amazon is already offering new OpenAI products on AWS
description: A day after OpenAI got Microsoft to agree to end exclusive rights, AWS announced a slate of OpenAI model offerings, including a new agent service.

title: ‘It’s Undignified’: Hundreds of Workers Training Meta’s AI Could Be Laid Off
description: More than 700 people working for a Meta contractor in Ireland are at risk of losing their jobs, documents show.

title: Elon Musk and Sam Altman are going to court over OpenAI’s future
description: After a yearslong legal feud, Elon Musk and OpenAI CEO Sam Altman are heading to trial this week in Northern California in a case that could have sweeping consequences. description: After five years, Distill will be taking a break.

title: Weight Banding
description: Weights in the final layer of common visual models appear as horizontal bands. We investigate how and why.
